forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 7.7/10 and survivability 83.3%. Base: 10.0% p.a., Bull: 17.0% p.a., Bear: -12.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. M1 DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. M2 P/S compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. M3 P/E uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. M+ NVT treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. M+ Peer Value anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. M+ Dilution-adj penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods that produce values outside 0.1x–8x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Historical price data unavailable for this token. Forecast chart shows projected values only.

coin_profile.name: Uniswap
coin_profile.description: Uniswap is the world's largest decentralised exchange (DEX) by volume, processing over $1 trillion in annual trading volume. Uniswap v4 introduced hooks architecture enabling customisable pools. A 0.15% interface fee on select token swaps is now live, generating growing protocol revenue. The fee switch has been activated for select pools and chains. UNI token holders govern the protocol and treasury ($650M+), with growing cashflow rights from interface and protocol fees.

2026.net_issuance_note: Current snapshot only. Historical supply data requires on-chain indexing not available via free APIs.

meta.data_note: No protocol fee or TVL data found for this token on DeFiLlama. Charts 1 and 2 are unavailable. Charts 3 and 4 show current-year supply and dilution data from CoinGecko.

forecast_meta.growth_basis_note: Annual growth rates derived from quality score 4.5/10 and survivability 53.3%. Base: 3.0% p.a., Bull: 9.0% p.a., Bear: -29.0% p.a.
forecast_meta.iv_selection_rationale: Bucket A (Cash-Flow Protocol): Valued using fee-based methods. M1 DCF discounts future fee revenue to present value. M2 P/S compares market cap to annual fees vs sector benchmarks. M3 P/E uses fee revenue accruing directly to token holders. M+ NVT treats trading volume as a proxy for network activity. M+ Peer Value anchors to expected market cap for this rank tier. M+ Dilution-adj penalises large token unlocks (high FDV/MC). Methods that produce values outside 0.1x–8x of current price are excluded as outliers. The median of all valid per-token estimates becomes the Speculative Fair Value.
forecast_meta.price_history_note: Historical price data unavailable for this token. Forecast chart shows projected values only.

Broader crypto market development continues to benefit established protocols
bear_points: No historical fee data available on DeFiLlama — protocol may be too new or too small to have an established economic track record
